title: erodium neglectum
intro: Erodium neglectum, also known as red-stemmed heron's bill or small heronsbill, is a plant species in the family Geraniaceae. It is primarily found in the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal remedies. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Erodium neglectum often include the roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
